How do I make a pumpkin pie?

First make the filling. In a medium bowl, combine the pumpkin puree, brown sugar, cinnamon, and salt. Gradually beat in the eggs, then the cream, and then the sweetened condensed milk. Stir in the pineapple chunk. Place the filling into the pre-baked pie crust or divide between the two crusts.

Next make the topping. In a medium bowl, mix together the walnuts (if using) and 2 tablespoons of the brown sugar until well combined. Spread the mixture on top of the pie, or around the edge of the crusts.
